test.summary: All 213 tests passed across 11 test files (contract tests, error handling, verification, integration)

lint.summary: N/A - No linter configured in project

appliedUpdates.description: Document that mock mode test assumptions often need iterative adjustment - LLM mock responses may not match initial expectations, requiring test assertion updates to match actual mock behavior
appliedUpdates.evidence: Worker had to iterate on test assertions during implementation: 'The mock response logic for POOR_QUALITY_IMAGE expects the question to be exactly "solve this equation", but our test uses "solve x + 3 = 10"'

appliedUpdates.description: Document character limit testing pattern - when testing string length limits, account for all characters in the string construction (prefix + repeated pattern)
appliedUpdates.evidence: Worker corrected character calculation: '"solve " + "x ".repeat(500) creates "solve xxxxxx..." which is 6 + 500*2 = 1006 characters, not 2500'

appliedUpdates.description: Document integration test best practice - validate non-deterministic LLM responses by checking structure and field presence rather than exact values
appliedUpdates.evidence: Test assertions check for response shape: 'assert.ok(response.body.finalAnswer && response.body.finalAnswer.length > 0)'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding guidance about pattern matching before implementation - workers should examine multiple existing files in the same category to understand conventions before writing new code. The e2e-integration-tests worker demonstrated this well by reading multiple test files first.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker read verification-integration.test.js, screenshot-handling.test.js, and context-preservation.test.js before creating e2e-flows.test.js

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker followed backend-worker skill procedure correctly
rejectedObservations.reason: This is expected behavior, not a guidance issue - no action needed

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker used Node.js built-in test runner consistently with existing tests

summary: Polish milestone scrutiny validation PASSED. All 213 tests pass across 11 test files. The single implementation feature (e2e-integration-tests) was reviewed and passed with no blocking issues. The feature successfully implements comprehensive end-to-end integration tests covering all 10 validation contract assertions plus 6 additional edge cases. Code quality is high, following existing testing patterns and conventions.
